name: Envestnet Wealth Management REST API
what_it_does: Envestnet wealth management REST API for registered investment advisors (RIAs), financial advisors, and wealth management firms to access investment management, financial planning, data aggregation, tax optimization, and portfolio analytics — enabling automated portfolio management, financial plan generation, account aggregation, tax optimization, and wealth reporting through Envestnet's integrated wealth management platform with $6T+ in assets served. Enables AI agents to manage portfolio management for model portfolio and allocation automation, handle financial planning for goal-based financial plan generation automation, access data aggregation for multi-account financial data consolidation automation, retrieve tax optimization for tax-loss harvesting and direct indexing automation, manage reporting for client portfolio performance reporting automation, handle risk analytics for portfolio risk assessment and allocation automation, access rebalancing for drift-based portfolio rebalancing automation, retrieve account management for client account opening and servicing automation, manage fee billing for advisory fee calculation and billing automation, and integrate Envestnet with CRM, custodians, and financial planning tools for integrated wealth management automation.
use_cases: Automating portfolio rebalancing and model-based investment management for RIA automation agents
Generating personalized financial plans and projections for advisor automation agents
Aggregating client financial accounts across institutions for wealth dashboard automation agents
Optimizing client portfolios for tax efficiency with direct indexing for tax automation agents
not_for: Retail self-directed investing (Envestnet is for financial advisors and RIAs, not retail consumers)
Institutional asset management (Envestnet targets wealth management, not institutional pension/endowment)
Real-time trading execution (Envestnet is portfolio management, not direct-to-market trading platform)
best_when: An RIA, financial advisor, or wealth management firm wanting AI agents to automate portfolio management, financial planning, tax optimization, and client reporting through Envestnet's comprehensive wealth management platform serving 100,000+ advisors.
avoid_when: ADVISOR PLATFORM REQUIRED: Envestnet is B2B for financial advisors; automated consumer access assumption creates advisor_account_required; automated must be licensed financial advisor or partner firm. CUSTODIAN CONNECTIVITY IS REQUIRED: Portfolio trading requires custodian connections (Schwab, Fidelity, TD Ameritrade); automated instant-trading assumption creates custodian_not_connected without configured custodian; automated must configure custodian connectivity. COMPLIANCE LAYER IS ADVISORY FIRM RESPONSIBILITY: Investment advice compliance is advisor's regulatory responsibility; automated built-in-compliance assumption creates regulatory_liability for advice given without proper compliance oversight; automated must involve compliance in workflow design. MODEL PORTFOLIO GOVERNANCE: Investment models require proper governance and approval before deployment; automated instant-model assumption creates unapproved_model_deployed for models not through proper investment committee; automated must follow firm's model governance process.

auth.notes: Envestnet uses OAuth2 for wealth management REST API. REST API with JSON. Berwyn, PA HQ. Founded 1999. NYSE:ENV. Products: Envestnet Portfolio Solutions, Envestnet Data & Analytics (Yodlee), Envestnet MoneyGuide (financial planning), Envestnet Insurance Exchange. $6T+ in assets served. 100,000+ advisors, 500+ enterprise clients. Yodlee acquired 2015 for data aggregation. Competes with Orion Advisor, Addepar, and Tamarac for wealth management technology.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo for qualified RIA and wealth management firms; production requires Envestnet agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by AUM or per-account; platform modules priced separately; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Berwyn PA. NYSE:ENV. AUM-based subscription. $6T+ assets served. 100,000+ financial advisors.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; portfolio and planning APIs throttled per enterprise plan

known_agent_gotchas: ACCOUNT AGGREGATION IS YODLEE: Data aggregation in Envestnet uses Yodlee technology; automated direct-account assumption creates credential_required for financial data aggregation using Yodlee connection vault; automated must manage Yodlee credentials for account aggregation

TRADE ORDER STATUS IS ASYNCHRONOUS: Portfolio trades are submitted to custodians and status confirmed asynchronously; automated instant-execution assumption creates pending_status for trades awaiting custodian confirmation; automated must poll trade status after order submission

MODEL ASSIGNMENT AFFECTS REBALANCING: Account rebalancing is driven by assigned model portfolio; automated ad-hoc-rebalancing assumption creates no_target_allocation for accounts without assigned investment model; automated must assign model before triggering rebalancing

PERFORMANCE CALCULATION HAS TIMING: Performance calculations run on scheduled basis, not real-time; automated instant-performance assumption creates calculation_not_yet_available for periods not yet calculated; automated must align with Envestnet's performance calculation schedule

FEE BILLING IS PERIOD-BASED: Advisory fee billing runs at period-end (monthly/quarterly); automated instant-billing assumption creates fee_not_yet_calculated for mid-period billing queries; automated must query billing at period-end calculation time
agent_readiness.security_notes: Wealth management. SOC2, SEC, FINRA, GLBA. OAuth2. US. Client investment and financial planning data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Wealth management. SOC2, SEC, FINRA. OAuth2. US. Advisor client investment and financial data.
